lines: There is nothing we can do.
We are low on food and need supplies.
Go see what you can find.
dialogueNpcs.name: Rick

lines: Ughh, this bite hurts so bad..
You'll have to go on without me.
Go look for Rick, he'll need your help now.
dialogueNpcs.message: Ughh, this bite hurts so bad..
dialogueNpcs.name: James
